title: House Committee on Science Space & Tech
text:
Lucas: $200 Million Infrastructure Law Award Continues to Raise Serious Concerns about DOE’s Ability to Protect Taxpayer Dollars from Exploitation
Lucas and Comer: White House is Giving Conflicting Guidance on Artificial Intelligence
Lucas and Comer sent a letter to the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) raising concerns about conflicting guidance from the administration on Artificial Intelligence (AI).
Lucas and Lofgren Introduce Bipartisan Bill on Commercial Remote Sensing
The bill renews an expired requirement for the Department of Commerce to send an annual report to Congress on the status of commercial remote sensing applications, regulations, and adjudications.
